title: What is China Manufacturing Hub?
summary: China Manufacturing Hub is a structured knowledge portal about sourcing, suppliers, industrial categories, and manufacturing ecosystems in China.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: China Manufacturing Hub is designed as a reference site covering industrial ecosystems, sourcing practices, verified suppliers, and practical buying knowledge.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.content: The site helps buyers, researchers, and entrepreneurs understand manufacturing categories, supplier networks, and sourcing workflows.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.content: Its content includes supplier listings, guides, industrial categories, timelines, glossary entries, and related articles.

title: How to Source from China
summary: A practical introduction to supplier research, qualification, communication, sampling, and logistics.

sections.heading: Research
sections.content: Start by identifying the product category, minimum order expectations, and the relevant industrial cluster.

sections.heading: Supplier Screening
sections.content: Check business identity, product fit, communication quality, and production capability before moving to sampling.

sections.heading: Sampling and Verification
sections.content: Request samples, compare specifications, and confirm consistency before placing larger orders.

title: Supplier Verification Guide
summary: Key steps for checking whether a supplier is credible, relevant, and operationally suitable.

sections.heading: Identity
sections.content: Verify the company name, city, category, and available contact channels.

sections.heading: Capability
sections.content: Check whether the supplier's product scope matches your actual sourcing requirement.

sections.heading: Risk Control
sections.content: Use staged orders, sample validation, and clear written requirements to reduce sourcing risk.
